## Required Updates

- [ ] Update canonical docs or status files
- [ ] Update generated capability tables if behavior/support changed
- [ ] Update examples or commands if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Run `make docs` if capability tables are affected
- [ ] Verify links and references

## Completion Criteria

- [ ] Docs accurately reflect current behavior
- [ ] No active task queue was added to markdown docs
- [ ] Issue or PR links are included where useful
